issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing: (1) 'limit' property should be 1, (2) 'filter' should specify '[Sanji] or Event' not 'Any', (3) missing 'lookCount' to indicate looking at top 4 cards, (4) missing action to place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order
Effect requires two separate actions: SearchDeck (with limit and filter) followed by an action to reorder remaining cards at bottom of deck. DSL currently contains only incomplete SearchDeck.
